title: Astel Layer Entry
description: One layer of the Astel Layer Stack (L0..L7, CLAUDE.md section 3). Common fields are shared; the 'kind' field fixes the layer's role and gates kind-specific blocks. Layers reference files by POSIX relative path and never inline splat geometry. See manifest-v0.md section 3.

kind.description: Fixed role of this layer. Each l0..l7 slot expects its canonical kind: l0=seed_pointcloud, l1=dense_pointcloud, l2=coarse_gaussians, l3=refined_gaussians, l4=appearance, l5=collision, l6=physics_material, l7=dynamics.

status.description: Lifecycle state, supporting the async preview/refine pipeline (CLAUDE.md section 1.6). 'present' means files are available; 'pending'/'failed'/'skipped' describe an incomplete pipeline.

files.description: Files backing this layer. Each entry is referenced by relative path with an integrity hash.

count.description: Primitive count for this layer (points for clouds, gaussians for splat layers). Per-gaussian accessors bound to a splat layer must have matching count.

derived_from.description: Layer ids this layer was computed from (provenance graph). E.g. L3 derived_from ['l1'], L5 derived_from ['l3'].

metrics.description: Per-stage telemetry and layer-specific quality (CLAUDE.md section 10.3). Wall-time, VRAM peak, and dollar estimate are logged for every stage; regressions fail CI.

vram_peak_mb.description: Peak VRAM in MB during this stage.

usd_estimate.description: Estimated compute cost in USD for this stage.

geometric.description: Geometric quality of this layer vs its reference (primarily for L3 vs L1). Mirrors quality_report.geometric_error.

chamfer_mm.description: Symmetric Chamfer distance to reference layer, in mm.

reference_layer.description: Layer used as the geometric reference.

provenance_ref.description: Index into the manifest 'provenance.channels' array binding this layer's per-primitive measured-vs-generated confidence buffer. Required for layers that carry per-primitive provenance (L0-L3).

kernel_type.description: Set on a splat layer that is homogeneous in kernel type. Mutually exclusive with kernel_batches.

kernel_batches.description: Mixed-kernel batch table for a splat layer that contains more than one kernel type. Each batch covers a contiguous index range. Mutually exclusive with kernel_type. See manifest-v0.md section 7.

budget.description: Splat budget for L3 (MCMC budget = product tier, DECISIONS.md arch decision 3).

appearance.description: L4-specific block: per-gaussian PBR channel accessors plus environment map. Channels are index-aligned to bound_to's gaussians. baked_pbr is a one-way-derived preview for plain-splat engines; baked-only is forbidden (CLAUDE.md section 3 L4).

bound_to.description: Splat layer these materials index (per-gaussian arrays are parallel to it).

env_map_path.description: Relative path to estimated environment illumination (.hdr/.exr), separated from albedo.

baked_pbr_path.description: Relative path to a baked-preview splat file derived from L4 for engines consuming only colored splats.

collision.description: L5-specific block: SDF, convex proxy set, print/physics-only isosurface, and mass properties. The isosurface is never a deliverable and exporters refuse to emit it except as .3mf/.stl (CLAUDE.md section 1.1, section 3 L5).

sdf_path.description: Relative path to the sparse-voxel SDF (.npz: origin, voxel_size, dims, indices, values).

convex_set_path.description: Relative path to the convex decomposition proxy set (.glb). Collision data only; never a visible deliverable.

isosurface.description: Watertight surface for the print and physics-volume paths ONLY.

path.description: Relative path to the watertight surface (.ply).

print_physics_only.description: Always true. Marks the isosurface as never-exportable as an asset; only emitted as .3mf/.stl print files.

mass_props_path.description: Relative path to mass_props.json (volume_m3, center_of_mass, inertia_tensor). Inertia requires L6 densities and is null until L6 is present.

physics_material.description: L6-specific block: semantic regions (material class, density, friction, restitution) and per-gaussian region map. Each region carries a confidence and a citation to the LLM/VLM reasoning trace (DECISIONS.md RA4).

regions_path.description: Relative path to regions.json (array of region descriptors).

region_map_accessor.description: Accessor index for per-gaussian uint16 region id, index-aligned to L3.

articulation.description: Optional detected joints / separable parts hints.

parent_region.description: Region id of the parent part.

child_region.description: Region id of the child part.

dynamics.description: L7-specific block: deformation representation and timeline for dynamic (video) captures (DECISIONS.md L7).

deformation_path.description: Relative path to the deformation field / 4DGS keyframe deltas (.bin).

timeline_path.description: Relative path to timeline.json (fps, frame_count, duration_s, loop, keyframes).

extras.description: Free-form layer data, ignored by validators.

allOf.description: kernel_type and kernel_batches are mutually exclusive.

fileRef.title: File Reference
fileRef.description: A file inside the package referenced by relative path with an integrity hash.

path.description: POSIX relative path from package root. No absolute paths, no '..' traversal.

role.description: Disambiguates multiple files of a layer. 'master' = full-precision archival; 'delivery' = compressed derived copy; 'provenance' = the per-primitive provenance buffer; others as needed.

derived.description: True if this file is a lossy derivative of a master in the same layer (e.g. a .spz delivery copy of the .ply master).

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the file contents, for integrity verification.

kernelType.title: Kernel Type
kernelType.description: Splat kernel type. Extensible: 'gaussian_3d' maps to KHR kernel:ellipse; 'gaussian_2d' is a surfel/disc (Astel L3 default per DECISIONS.md). Reserved/future and custom:* values must be preserved by readers even if unrenderable (manifest-v0.md section 7).

kernelBatch.title: Kernel Batch
kernelBatch.description: A contiguous range of splats within a layer that share a kernel type and attribute set.

first.description: Index of the first splat in this batch within the layer's ordered splat buffer.

count.description: Number of splats in this batch; covers indices [first, first+count).

attributes.description: Names of per-splat fields this batch carries (e.g. surfels carry a 2-vector scale + normal; ellipsoids a 3-vector scale).
